# Stringer Steps
Free step-by-step walkthroughs by Phil Stringer. Public library at https://stringersteps.com. New guides drop all the time.

## Guides
- Set Up Your First AI Agent — Build your first working AI agent, one step at a time, no code required. — https://stringersteps.com/aiagent
- Use Fable 5 Before It's Gone — Get real work out of the smartest AI model before it's retired. — https://stringersteps.com/fable5
- Hire Your AI Marketing Department — Install an AI Director of Marketing and three specialists that market your real estate business in your voice. — https://stringersteps.com/agency
- Connect Follow Up Boss to Claude — Connect your Follow Up Boss CRM to Claude and run your whole pipeline in plain English. — https://stringersteps.com/followupboss
